worker_tasks.task_scope: Compare class-conditioned distribution profiles of backward packet length features across multiple dataset partitions preserving class labels and partition metadata.
stop_conditions: distribution profiles compared across all partitions

Evaluate local label-topology consistency around backward packet length features within each class to detect structural irregularities.

structural irregularities identified or ruled out
